---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

::: page-header
# Research & Publications
:::

::: jump-nav
[Current focus](#current-research-focus){.jump-link}
[Supervisory team](#supervisory-team){.jump-link}
[Publications](#publications){.jump-link}
[Peer review](#peer-review){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current research focus

My present research centres on school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) — the subset of school non-attendance driven by emotional distress rather than truancy or parent-condoned absence. This forms the basis of my PhD by publication, which comprises three interlinked empirical papers.

::: phd-status-strip
::: phd-status-item
[Ethics]{.status-label} [Approved]{.status-value .status-good}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Data access]{.status-label} [Granted]{.status-value .status-good}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 1]{.status-label} [Manuscript in progress]{.status-value .status-WIP}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 2]{.status-label} [Variable selection & methods]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 3]{.status-label} [Data granted; pending]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Estimated completion]{.status-label} [2027]{.status-value .status-goal}
:::
:::

::: paper-grid
::: paper-card
[Paper 1]{.paper-label}

### Systematic review

A [PROSPERO-registered](https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251089918){.prospero-badge} systematic review and narrative synthesis of interventions for emotionally based school avoidance, examining construct definitions, outcome operationalisation, and intervention targets.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 2]{.paper-label}

### Longitudinal modelling

Examining how patterns of school attendance develop across childhood and early adolescence using large-scale Australian longitudinal cohort data (LSAC).
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 3]{.paper-label}

### Population-level attendance

Exploring system-level patterns in school attendance and non-attendance using national education data, with attention to how administrative reporting shapes the visibility of EBSA.
:::
:::

## Supervisory team

::: supervisor-row
[Dr Daniel Zarate](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1508-8637){.supervisor-link} [A/Prof Vasileios Stavropoulos](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6964-4662){.supervisor-link} [Dr Taylor Brown](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9814-3832){.supervisor-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
/* Publications layout */
.pub-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
.pub-main { min-width: 0; }
.pub-sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 80px;
}
.sidebar-section {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e4e1da;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}
.sidebar-label {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #5c5c5c;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.sidebar-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}
.sidebar-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a2e4a !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid #e4e1da;
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
}
.sidebar-link:hover {
  background: #eef2f8;
  border-color: #1a2e4a;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

/* Publications content — reusing existing site classes inline */
.pub-year-head {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #c8922a;
  margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e4e1da;
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
}
.pub-entry-block {
  padding: 1rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e1da;
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.pub-entry-block:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
.pub-favicon {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid #e4e1da;
  background: #f8f7f5;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  object-fit: contain;
  padding: 3px;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.pub-favicon-fallback {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid #e4e1da;
  background: #eef2f8;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 2px;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2e4a;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}
.pub-entry-text {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}
.pub-title-link {
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a2e4a !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  line-height: 1.55;
  display: inline;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  background-image: linear-gradient(#c8922a, #c8922a);
  background-size: 0% 1px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: left bottom;
  transition: background-size 0.25s ease, color 0.15s;
}
.pub-title-link:hover {
  color: #c8922a !important;
  background-size: 100% 1px;
}
.pub-journal-name {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #5c5c5c;
  font-style: italic;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
}
.pub-loading {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #5c5c5c;
  padding: 1rem 0;
}

/* Peer review section */
.peer-review-section {
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding-top: 1.5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #e4e1da;
}
.peer-review-section h2 {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2e4a;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.peer-review-section p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #2a2a2a;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .pub-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .pub-sidebar { display: none; }
}
</style>

<div class="pub-layout">

  <!-- Main: Publications + Peer review -->
  <div class="pub-main">

    <h2 id="publications" style="font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;font-size:1.55rem;font-weight:700;color:#1a2e4a;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Publications</h2>

    <div id="orcid-pubs">
      <p class="pub-loading">Loading publications from ORCID…</p>
    </div>

    <div class="peer-review-section">
      <h2 id="peer-review">Peer review</h2>
      <p>I contribute to peer review for journals in psychology, behavioural science, and digital health. Recent reviews include work for <em>Behaviour &amp; Information Technology</em> and <em>Scientific Reports</em>.</p>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Sidebar -->
  <div class="pub-sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-section">
      <span class="sidebar-label">Find me online</span>
      <div class="sidebar-links">
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
        <a href="https://digitalminds.au/connor-conkey-morrison/" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">DigitalMinds</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ccicm" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
// DOI prefix → journal domain lookup
// Covers major publishers in psychology, behavioural science, and health
const DOI_DOMAINS = {
  // Elsevier
  '10.1016': 'elsevier.com',
  // Springer / Springer Nature
  '10.1007': 'springer.com',
  '10.1038': 'nature.com',
  '10.1186': 'biomedcentral.com',
  // Wiley
  '10.1002': 'wiley.com',
  '10.1111': 'wiley.com',
  // Taylor & Francis / Routledge
  '10.1080': 'tandfonline.com',
  '10.4324': 'routledge.com',
  // APA
  '10.1037': 'apa.org',
  '10.1027': 'hogrefe.com',
  // SAGE
  '10.1177': 'sagepub.com',
  // Oxford University Press
  '10.1093': 'oup.com',
  // Cambridge University Press
  '10.1017': 'cambridge.org',
  // PLOS
  '10.1371': 'plos.org',
  // BMJ
  '10.1136': 'bmj.com',
  // Frontiers
  '10.3389': 'frontiersin.org',
  // MDPI
  '10.3390': 'mdpi.com',
  // American Psychological Association (alt)
  '10.1521': 'guilford.com',
  // Karger
  '10.1159': 'karger.com',
  // Informa / Psychology Press
  '10.1080': 'tandfonline.com',
  // De Gruyter
  '10.1515': 'degruyter.com',
  // Emerald
  '10.1108': 'emerald.com',
};

function getDomainForDoi(doi) {
  if (!doi) return null;
  const prefix = doi.split('/')[0];
  return DOI_DOMAINS[prefix] || null;
}

function faviconUrl(domain) {
  return `https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=${domain}&sz=64`;
}

function pubIconHtml(doi) {
  const domain = getDomainForDoi(doi);
  if (domain) {
    // Use img with onerror fallback to initials icon
    const initials = domain.split('.')[0].slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
    return `<img
      class="pub-favicon"
      src="${faviconUrl(domain)}"
      alt="${domain}"
      onerror="this.style.display='none';this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex';"
    /><div class="pub-favicon-fallback" style="display:none;">${initials}</div>`;
  }
  // No domain known — show neutral icon
  return `<div class="pub-favicon-fallback">📄</div>`;
}

function renderWorks(works) {
  const byYear = {};
  for (const w of works) {
    const y = w.year || 'n.d.';
    if (!byYear[y]) byYear[y] = [];
    byYear[y].push(w);
  }

  let html = '';
  for (const year of Object.keys(byYear).sort((a, b) => b - a)) {
    html += `<span class="pub-year-head">${year}</span>`;
    for (const w of byYear[year]) {
      const href = w.doi ? `https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '#';
      const target = w.doi ? ' target="_blank"' : '';
      html += `
        <div class="pub-entry-block">
          ${pubIconHtml(w.doi)}
          <div class="pub-entry-text">
            <a href="${href}"${target} class="pub-title-link">${w.title}</a>
            ${w.journal ? `<span class="pub-journal-name">${w.journal}</span>` : ''}
          </div>
        </div>`;
    }
  }
  return html;
}

async function loadOrcidPublications() {
  const container = document.getElementById('orcid-pubs');
  try {
    const res = await fetch('https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/0009-0000-1020-2333/works', {
      headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
    });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    const data = await res.json();

    const works = [];
    for (const group of data.group || []) {
      const summary = group['work-summary']?.[0];
      if (!summary) continue;

      const title = summary.title?.title?.value || 'Untitled';
      const year = summary['publication-date']?.year?.value || 'n.d.';
      const journal = summary['journal-title']?.value || '';

      let doi = null;
      for (const eid of summary['external-ids']?.['external-id'] || []) {
        if (eid['external-id-type'] === 'doi') {
          doi = eid['external-id-value'];
          break;
        }
      }

      works.push({ title, year: parseInt(year) || 0, journal, doi });
    }

    if (works.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="pub-loading">No publications found.</p>';
      return;
    }

    works.sort((a, b) => b.year - a.year);

    let html = renderWorks(works);
    const now = new Date();
    const synced = now.toLocaleDateString('en-AU', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
    html += `<p style="font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.72rem;color:#5c5c5c;margin-top:1.5rem;letter-spacing:0.02em;">Synced from <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333" target="_blank" style="color:#5c5c5c;text-decoration:underline;">ORCID</a> · ${synced}</p>`;
    container.innerHTML = html;

  } catch (e) {
    // Fallback — static list with favicons still applied
    const fallback = [
      { title: 'Incremental Validity of Cognitive Impulsivity, Emotional Impulsivity, and Sensation Seeking in the Predictions of ADHD Inattention and Hyperactivity/Impulsivity Symptoms in Adults', year: 2025, journal: 'Journal of Psychopathology and Behavioral Assessment', doi: '10.1007/s10862-025-10252-6' },
      { title: 'Stress-coping mechanisms and problematic social media use: A network analysis and differences across men and women', year: 2025, journal: 'Computers in Human Behavior Reports', doi: '10.1016/j.chbr.2025.100848' },
      { title: 'Flowing in the net of disordered gaming: A network analysis approach', year: 2025, journal: 'Addictive Behaviors Reports', doi: '10.1016/j.abrep.2025.100606' },
      { title: 'Examining how gamers connect with their avatars to assess their anxiety: A novel artificial intelligence approach', year: 2024, journal: 'Acta Psychologica', doi: '10.1016/j.actpsy.2024.104298' },
    ];
    container.innerHTML = renderWorks(fallback);
  }
}

loadOrcidPublications();
</script>
```
